languages.text: О Ярубе говорят как о человеке с нужными талантами. Следует обсудить с ним детали.

traits.locale_text: О Ярубе говорят как о человеке с нужными талантами. Следует обсудить с ним детали.

languages.text: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.
languages.original_text: О Ярубе говорят как о человеке с нужными талантами. Следует обсудить с ним детали.

traits.locale_text: Of Jarub, they speak as a man possessed of the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

languages.text: Jarub scheint ein Mann mit den erforderlichen Talenten zu sein. Nun gilt es, die Details mit ihm zu besprechen.
languages.original_text: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

traits.locale_text: Jarub scheint ein Mann mit den erforderlichen Talenten zu sein. Nun gilt es, die Details mit ihm zu besprechen.

languages.text: On dit de Jarub qu'il a les talents nécessaires. Il faut lui expliquer le plan.
languages.original_text: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

traits.locale_text: On dit de Jarub qu'il a les talents nécessaires. Il faut lui expliquer le plan.

languages.text: 据说雅鲁布具备这种专业才能。必须跟他谈谈具体细节。
languages.original_text: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

traits.locale_text: 据说雅鲁布具备这种专业才能。必须跟他谈谈具体细节。

languages.text: Se dice que Jarub posee los talentos necesarios. Hay que discutir los detalles del robo con él.
languages.original_text: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.

traits.locale_text: Se dice que Jarub posee los talentos necesarios. Hay que discutir los detalles del robo con él.

languages.text: 鑓場は正しい才能を持った男として語られている。詳細は本人と話し合うべきだ。
languages.original_text: Yaruba is spoken of as a man with the right talents. The details should be discussed with him.

languages.text: Jarub'dan gerekli becerilere sahip bir adam olarak bahsediliyor. Ayrıntılar onunla konuşulmalı.
